name: @hasna/contacts
description: Contact management for AI coding agents — CLI + MCP + Web

scripts.build: cd dashboard && bun run build && cd .. && bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.build:core: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
